name: Mexican Casserole
recipeIngredient: 2 11 oz cans Tomatillos, drained and chopped
8 Ounces Colby-Monterey Jack cheese blend, shredded
1/2 Cup Old El Paso Thick 'n Chunky Salsa, optional
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F. Spray a 13x9-inch (3-quart) baking dish with nonstick cooking spray. Place 2 cups of the tortilla chips at the bottom of the sprayed baking dish. Layer the chicken over the chips.
2. In a medium bowl, combine onions, tomatillos, green chiles, cumin, and garlic; stir until well mixed. Spread this onion mixture over the chicken. Dollop teaspoons of sour cream over the onion mixture. Sprinkle with cheese. Cover the baking dish with foil.
3. Bake for 30 minutes. Remove the cover and sprinkle with the remaining 1 cup tortilla chips. Bake an additional 20-25 minutes, or until thoroughly heated. Serve with salsa.
